title: Review: SpaceRole enum, contact_set atomicity
notes:
Maintainer risk: LOW — The runtime behavior is correct and well-tested. The only real risk issues are: (1) a misleading test comment that overstates compiler enforcement for SpaceRole::all(), which could lead to a future variant being missed in all(); and (2) a precondition violation returning Err instead of unreachable!, which leaks an internal debug message if it somehow fires.
Confidence: 90% no missed bugs. Uncertainty driven by: did not trace all JMAP call paths (only contact_set, contact_query, space_set reviewed in depth); did not run the test suite to verify the state-bump test passes cleanly. Would raise confidence with: cargo test --workspace output, and reviewing contact_get/space_get to ensure they read the single state token correctly after a two-field patch.
